judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports are thorough and hit all four expectations; Report 2 is marginally stronger on explicit fix recommendations (prod build, remove-entirely for the sink and legacy secret), but they are essentially comparable.

report_1.evidence: Line 2 `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"` → should be `"false"`... Line 3 `AUTH_RELAXED = "true"` → should be `"false"`... Line 4 `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"` → should be removed/empty... Fix: clear `SHADOW_SCORING_SINK`

report_2.evidence: `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"` — `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:2`... `AUTH_RELAXED = "true"` — line 3... `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"` — line 4... must be **removed entirely**... `SHADOW_SCORING_SINK`... Must be **removed entirely**... `LEGACY_BILLING_SECRET_ARN`... remove it.

report_1.evidence: VITE_`-prefixed vars are **inlined into the bundle at build time**... the shipped prod bundle has `VITE_API_BASE_URL` baked as **`https://staging-api.example.com`**. Production users' browsers would call the **staging API**. There is no `frontend/.env.production` in the repo, and no separate prod build step

report_2.evidence: the shipped production bundle's API base URL is `https://staging-api.example.com`... the identical digest is promoted to prod... Fix requires a prod build (`--mode production`) with a `.env.production` containing the real prod API URL, a separately-built prod image

report_1.evidence: `docs/prod-runbook.md:6` claims "migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but `deploy.yml` has no migration step... a first prod launch needs the DB provisioned and migrated — none of that is wired up here.

report_2.evidence: `docs/prod-runbook.md:6` claims "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but nothing in `deploy.yml` runs migrations... On a brand-new prod DB the three migrations (`0001_base`, `0002_tenants`, `0003_billing`) must run first.

report_1.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf:3` still sets `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:**staging**"` (unchanged in the copy)... Fix: set the prod `oidc_sub_condition` to `repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production`.

report_2.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf:3` still carries the copied `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"`... Fix: set `infra/prod/main.tf:3` to `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production"`.
